title: draba verna var. lepida
intro: Draba verna var. lepida, also known as the Spring Cress or Alpine Cress, is a rare and endangered plant species in the genus Draba, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba verna var. lepida include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve congestion, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically harvested and dried, then used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
